hero.titleA: Are You Cut Out to Be a One-Person Company?
hero.titleC: Stop Being a Cog: Find Your Solo-Business Fit
hero.titleD: Escape the Rat Race: Assess Your Solo-Preneur Potential
hero.titleE: From Employee to Super Individual — One Assessment Away
hero.subtitle: Built on three foundational frameworks — The Almanack of Naval Ravikant, Company of One, and Super Individual — this assessment evaluates your independent business fitness across 6 core dimensions. 128 carefully curated questions. Discover your entrepreneurial blueprint in 15 minutes.

value.title: The OPC Assessment Framework
value.subtitle: A scientific evaluation across 6 core dimensions to find your optimal path from employee to super individual
value.main_desc: The OPC Assessment combines behavioral psychology with business methodology. Through six dimensions — Decision-Making Independence, Resource Integration, Risk Resilience, Brand Building, Systems Operations, and Continuous Learning — we build a complete personal profile. This isn't just a personality test. It's an actionable business roadmap.
value.item1_desc: Decision-Making, Resource Integration, Risk Resilience, Brand Building, Systems Operations, Continuous Learning — a full scan of your entrepreneurial DNA.
value.item2_desc: Built on Likert scales and Behavioral Event Interviewing (BEI). Each dimension uses 20+ carefully selected questions for professional-grade reliability and validity.
value.item3_desc: Beyond a fitness score, you'll receive personalized development advice, capability roadmaps, and recommended business tracks — turning insights into action.

theory.title: Theoretical Foundation
theory.subtitle: Three landmark works form the intellectual backbone of this assessment
theory.book1_desc: The fundamental logic of wealth and happiness. Key insight: leverage, productized self, and compound interest are critical indicators of one-person company fitness.
theory.book2_desc: Redefining success: right-sized, profit-first, lifestyle-first. Our Systems Operations and Risk Resilience dimensions draw directly from this framework.
theory.book3_desc: A model for capability migration from organizational person to free agent. Core focus on brand building, resource integration, and continuous learning — the practical guide to solo-business capability.

faq.title: What You Need to Know About OPC
faq.q1_desc: A One-Person Company (OPC) is the hottest entrepreneurial trend of 2026. One person, empowered by AI tools and automation systems, independently executes what traditionally required a full team. From freelancing and side hustles to full-time entrepreneurship, OPC is becoming the choice of millions. Covered by People's Daily and 36Kr.
faq.q2_title: Am I Suited to Be a One-Person Company?
faq.q2_desc: Not everyone is cut out for independent business. The OPC Assessment evaluates your fitness across 6 dimensions — Decision-Making, Resource Integration, Risk Resilience, Brand Building, Systems Operations, Continuous Learning. Complete the test in 15 minutes and receive your personalized assessment report and action roadmap. Over 1,000 people have used it to upgrade their self-awareness.
faq.q3_title: What Businesses Can an OPC Run?
faq.q3_desc: OPC businesses span a wide range: AI content creation, personal branding, digital products, e-commerce dropshipping, social media management, consulting, and more. Based on your capability profile, OPC recommends your top 3 business tracks with a 30-day actionable SOP plan.

cta.title: Start Now — Discover Your One-Person Company Potential
cta.subtitle: Complete the assessment in 15 minutes. Get your personalized fitness report and action roadmap instantly. 1,283 entrepreneurs have already upgraded their self-awareness.

report_paid.tracks_subtitle: Best startup directions based on your ability profile
report_paid.sop_subtitle: One small step each day, from zero to one in 30 days
report_paid.pitfall_subtitle: 5 most common traps on the solo-business journey
report_paid.pitfall_1: Don't wait until everything is ready — launch first, iterate later. Perfectionism is the #1 killer of momentum.
report_paid.pitfall_2: Don't try to do everything at once — focus on one track, one product, one channel. Go deep before going wide.
report_paid.pitfall_3: Don't ignore cash flow management — even a small business needs clear bookkeeping and pricing.
report_paid.pitfall_4: Don't work in isolation — actively join communities, find a mentor or partner. Solo doesn't mean alone.
report_paid.pitfall_5: Don't neglect your health — you ARE the company's core asset. Maintaining energy = maintaining competitiveness.
report_paid.cta_body: Book a 1-on-1 deep diagnosis, with a senior coach tailoring the report analysis and landing plan for you.
report_paid.share_desc: Share with friends and start your solo-business journey together

report_pdf.closing_text: The essence of a one-person company is leveraging minimal resources to maximize personal value. You don't need to be a "versatile player" — find your strongest point, invest consistently, deliver consistently, and grow consistently. This report is your starting point, not your destination. The real answer lies in your next action.
report_pdf.glossary_def_1: A small-scale business organization centered around an individual or minimal team.
report_pdf.glossary_def_2: Personally verified capabilities with differentiated advantages in the market.
report_pdf.glossary_def_3: The complete monetization chain from customer acquisition to after-sales service.
report_pdf.glossary_def_4: Business direction and launch plan tailored to your capability profile.
report_pdf.glossary_def_5: Standard Operating Procedure — streamlining repetitive work into repeatable processes.
report_pdf.footer_line1: This report was automatically generated by the OPC Assessment System
report_pdf.footer_line2: Report content and assessment models are protected by copyright law. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

services.title: Services We Offer
services.subtitle: From registration to subsidies to tax compliance — we guide you through every step.
services.reg_desc: Full-service OPC registration: name approval, license application, seal registration, and bank account setup.
services.subsidy_desc: Identify eligible subsidies for your city and industry. We prepare all documentation and handle the application.
services.tax_desc: Understand your tax obligations from day one. Monthly/quarterly filings, VAT thresholds, and compliance tips.
services.cta_desc: Take the free OPC fit assessment first, or contact us for a consultation.
services.foreigner_subtitle: Complete guide for foreign nationals — requirements, process, timeline, and how we can help.
services.foreigner_step1_desc: Gather the required documentation for your OPC registration. Requirements vary slightly depending on your city and whether you are a foreign national or Chinese resident.
services.foreigner_step2_desc: File your application with the local Administration for Market Regulation. We handle the submission, follow-up, and revisions if needed.
services.foreigner_step3_desc: After receiving your license, open a corporate bank account and complete tax registration.
services.foreigner_why: Why Register an OPC in China?
